name: Alex Chen
headline: Senior Data Engineer
summary: Senior Data Engineer with 8 years building large-scale streaming and batch pipelines. Strong in Python, Spark, Airflow, Snowflake, and AWS. Comfortable as a tech lead on small teams.

experience.title: Senior Data Engineer
highlights: Owned the streaming ingestion platform (Kafka -> Spark -> Snowflake) handling 2B events/day.
Reduced backfill latency 6x by rewriting the orchestration layer in Airflow + dbt.
Drove HIPAA/SOC2 readiness for the data plane.

experience.title: Data Engineer
highlights: Built the customer 360 warehouse on BigQuery + dbt, serving 40+ analyst seats.
Migrated the EL stack from Airflow 1.10 to 2.5 with zero unplanned downtime.
